title: elatostema helferianum
intro: Elatostema helferianum, also known as the 'Helfer's creeping vine' or 'Creeping Elatostema', is a type of perennial flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Asia. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Elatostema helferianum include reducing fever, alleviating pain and inflammation, and improving respiratory conditions such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to reap its medicinal properties.
